microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling features that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**—surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
Built an internal **AI agent** using LLM-powered automation to restructure drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing overall drill capacity by 21%.

Defined and tracked input metrics and success metrics across resilience initiatives, running data-driven post-drill analyses to surface systemic failure patterns and inform roadmap prioritization across partner teams.

Aligned stakeholders across Engineering, Operations, and partner orgs on a unified product vision for resilience tooling, influencing cross-functional adoption and accelerating execution across 3 sovereign-cloud programs.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, running user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ user research interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into prioritized specs.
Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool and enforcing metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% across internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ service teams.
Drove product discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built and socialized a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize the highest-ROI investments in the launch pipeline.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating launch plans across IT and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority backlog tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain delivery velocity throughout the migration.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM workflow that improved conversion and cut proposal turnaround time.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted site conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website funnel and Google Business profile for local search.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had persisted undetected across multiple service lines.
